Segments.Content:
# Markdown Editor Playground

Welcome! Each block below is a **segment** — try dragging the handle on the left to reorder them, click the **+** button at the bottom to add new ones, or use the per-segment sidebar to format text.

## Segment Two — Lists & Inline Formatting

- *Italic*, **bold**, and `inline code`
- [Links](https://retold.dev) open externally in the preview
- Drag the handle on the left to reorder this block

> Blockquotes work too, and so do tables:

| Feature | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Markdown | yes |
| Drag-reorder | yes |
| Rich preview | yes |

### A Tiny Embedded Image

![Pict segmented editor](data:image/svg+xml;utf8,%3Csvg%20xmlns%3D%22http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg%22%20viewBox%3D%220%200%20120%2040%22%3E%3Crect%20width%3D%22120%22%20height%3D%2240%22%20fill%3D%22%23E76F51%22%2F%3E%3Ctext%20x%3D%2260%22%20y%3D%2225%22%20text-anchor%3D%22middle%22%20fill%3D%22%23FAEDCD%22%20font-family%3D%22sans-serif%22%20font-size%3D%2214%22%3EPICT%3C%2Ftext%3E%3C%2Fsvg%3E)

Image-paste collapses long data URIs into compact placeholders so the editor stays readable.
